prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref: The image features an arrangement of bananas on top of each other, creating a visually appealing stack. There are at least six bananas in various positions within this stack, with some overlapping others. They appear to be placed on a dining table or countertop, which serves as their base. In addition to the bananas, there is also a bottle located near the left side of the frame, possibly containing a drink or condiment that complements the fruit display.
